appName.description: Extension name shown in Chrome and the Web Store.

appDesc.message: Analyzes website trustworthiness and risk while browsing, detecting phishing, social engineering, and manipulative content.
appDesc.description: Extension description shown in Chrome and the Web Store.

sum_url_warn.message: This URL has some warning signs.

sum_reputation.message: This site has a good reputation.

sum_reputation_warn.message: This site has some reputation warnings.

sum_reputation_bad.message: This site has a bad reputation.

sum_content_bad.message: This page shows signs of phishing.

sum_ai.message: AI model did not find threats.

sum_ai_warn.message: The AI flagged some risk signals.

sum_ai_bad.message: The AI thinks this page is likely malicious.

sum_ai_idle.message: Run AI analysis to check this page.

sum_restricted.message: Chrome blocks extensions on this page.

reason_link_listed.message: destination is on the phishing blocklist

reason_link_redirectParam.message: redirects elsewhere through a URL parameter

reason_link_textMismatch.message: link text shows a different domain than it opens

ai_summary_body.message: The content appears to be legitimate and safe.

ai_note_idle.message: Run the analysis to see the AI's notes.

ai_err_noKey.message: No API key set for the selected provider.

ai_err_request.message: Couldn't reach the AI service. Check your API key and connection.

ai_err_parse.message: The AI returned an unreadable response. Try again.

set_autoscan_help.message: When on, Risk Radar scans every page you visit on its own, without opening the popup: it shows a colour-coded risk badge on the toolbar icon and highlights findings on the page. It runs the same URL, reputation, content, and link checks the popup does; the AI analysis is never run automatically.

set_linkscan.message: Check the reputation of links I click

set_linkscan_help.message: When on, clicking a link checks the reputation of both the link itself and the address it finally lands on, since redirects can change it along the way. A small overlay on the page shows a verdict for each address.

set_warnings_help.message: Applies both when you click a link flagged as malicious and when you type a risky address in the URL bar.

set_guard_action.message: What to do when a risky navigation is caught

set_guard_action_help.message: Warn shows a confirmation you can accept to continue anyway. Block cancels the navigation and shows a message that the website is blocked. Do nothing lets the navigation through without interruption; flagged links are still outlined.

set_ai_provider_help.message: Which provider the popup uses for AI analysis by default. You can still switch providers for a single scan from the popup.

set_ai_scan_mode_help.message: Automatic scans call the AI (and bill your provider) every time you open the popup on a scannable page, and need a key for the selected provider. Manual scans only run when you click Analyze.

set_apikey_help.message: Used for AI-based content analysis. Anthropic is pay as you go with no free tier: you buy prepaid credits and are billed per token, so a scan usually costs a fraction of a cent. Stored locally on your device.

set_apikey_link.message: Get a key at the Anthropic Console

set_deepseek_apikey_help.message: A lower cost alternative for AI content analysis. DeepSeek is pay as you go and needs a small prepaid balance, billed per token at a few cents per million tokens. Stored locally on your device.

set_deepseek_apikey_link.message: Get a key at the DeepSeek Platform

set_safebrowsing_apikey_help.message: Optional. Safe Browsing already works without a key via Google's public Transparency Report; a key upgrades it to the official Lookup API. The key is free: create a project in Google Cloud and enable the Safe Browsing API. Stored locally on your device.

set_safebrowsing_apikey_link.message: Get a key in the Google Cloud Console

set_virustotal_apikey_help.message: Needed for the VirusTotal check. With a key the row shows an inline malicious/total verdict; without one the popup shows a 'Key needed' prompt. A free public key is enough for personal use but is rate limited (about 4 lookups per minute); paid plans raise the limits. Stored locally on your device.

set_highlights_content_help.message: Choose which content findings get highlighted on the page. Changes apply the next time the popup scans a page.

set_highlights_links_help.message: Choose which links get outlined on the page. Changes apply the next time the popup scans a page.
